channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cuba says international airlines can no longer refuel there as Trump turns up the pressure
item.description: The update comes shortly after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened tariffs on any country that supplies Cuba with oil.

item.title: Hims & Hers shares tumbling after U-turn on plans for oral Wegovy competitor
Japanese Prime Minister Takaichi's ruling LDP set to secure supermajority in Lower House: NHK
item.description: PM Takaichi's Liberal Democratic Party is likely to win between 274-328 seats in the Lower House, higher than the 233 seats needed for a majority, NHK...

item.title: 3 things to know about âTrump accountsâ â the new investment vehicle for kids
Hong Kong media baron and pro-democracy activist Jimmy Lai sentenced to 20 years in prison
item.description: Lai, who had pleaded not guilty to all charges, was among the first prominent figures arrested under Beijing's security law in August 2020.

item.title: U.S. stock futures rise ahead of key jobs and and inflation reports
Tech's been shaky, but these 20 companies could still see rocketing sales growth
3 things to know about âTrump accountsâ â the new investment vehicle for kids
Federal judge orders Fulton County Georgia election case documents unsealed by Tuesday
item.description: The FBI last month raided an election facility central to President Donald Trump's debunked claims of fraud in the 2020 election.

item.title: Epstein files: Congressional lawmakers call for Trump Commerce chief Lutnick to resign, or be fired
item.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick previously said on a podcast that he had cut ties with the notorious sex offender since an initial 2005 encounter.
